title: hopea pubescens
intro: Hopea pubescens, also known as the 'Malaysian ironwood', is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hopea pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
